files.name: main.py
files.content:
class Kakformer(set):
  def __str__(self):
    sträng = "Former: "
    for form in self:
      sträng +=  str(form) + ", "
    return sträng[:-2] 

def main():	
  mina_former = Kakformer({"hjärta", "gran", "gris", "klocka"})
  print(mina_former)
  kompis_former = Kakformer({"hjärta", "häst", "älg", "stjärna"})
  
  snitt = mina_former.intersection(kompis_former)
  alla = mina_former.union(kompis_former)
  print("Snitt: ", snitt)
  print("Union: ", Kakformer(alla))
  
  
main()
